title: Cover Basics
discoveryHint: Craft a Pump or Conveyor to learn about covers.

sections.text: Covers are attachments placed on machine and pipe faces. They automate item and fluid transfer, provide redstone control, and filter throughput. Each face can hold one cover. Place by right-clicking with the cover item. Remove with a Crowbar.
Open a cover's configuration GUI by shift-right-clicking with an empty hand, or right-clicking with a Screwdriver. You can also shift-right-click on another face using the grid in the machine GUI.

Covers have transfer mode settings: Disabled (only the cover transfers), Allow Filtered (external transfer only if it matches the filter), and Allow Unfiltered (any transfer allowed). Placing a lower-tier cover on a higher-tier machine is safe.
